hero.name: Luciano Romero
hero.title: FullStack Software Developer
hero.subtitle: FullStack developer specialized in modern web and mobile applications using React, React Native, Node.js and Next.js. Passionate about building scalable products and real-world solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A little about who I am
about.bio1: I'm a FullStack software developer with around four years of experience building web and mobile applications. I enjoy creating scalable systems and transforming ideas into real products.
about.bio2: Currently I am studying Information Systems Engineering at the National Technological University (UTN) while developing professional and personal projects focused on modern web technologies and mobile applications.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to new opportunities, collaborations, or interesting projects.
contact.tagline: Let us talk about your next project
contact.availability: Available for remote opportunities and high-impact freelance projects.
